In a large bowl, whisk the flax meal and water and let sit for 5 minutes. Add the mashed bananas, melted coconut oil, maple syrup, coconut sugar, vanilla, baking soda, baking powder, and salt, then whisk to combine. Stir in the almond meal, oat flour, and gluten-free flour blend until a thick batter forms. Transfer the batter into the loaf pan and bake for 60-75 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Let cool completely before slicing.\",\n    \"thumbnail_image_url\": \"https://minimalistbaker.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/02/1-BOWL-Gluten-Free-Banana-Bread-8.jpg\"\n  },\n  {\n    \"recipe_name\": \"Easy Vegan Banana Bread\",\n    \"ingredients\": [\n      \"3 medium ripe bananas (mashed)\",\n      \"1 tbsp flaxseed meal (for flax egg)\",\n      \"2.5 tbsp water\",\n      \"1/4 cup melted coconut oil (or vegan butter)\",\n      \"1/4 cup organic cane sugar\",\n      \"1/4 cup brown sugar\",\n      \"1 tsp vanilla extract\",\n      \"1 tsp baking soda\",\n      \"1 tsp baking powder\",\n      \"1/2 tsp sea salt\",\n      \"1/2 cup unsweetened almond milk\",\n      \"1 cup unbleached all-purpose flour\",\n      \"1 cup whole wheat pastry flour (or sub more all-purpose)\"\n    ],\n    \"cooking_instructions\": \"Preheat oven to 350°F (176°C) and grease a standard loaf pan. Prepare flax egg by mixing flaxseed meal and water in a large bowl; let rest for 5 minutes. Add mashed bananas, melted oil, cane sugar, brown sugar, vanilla, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and almond milk, whisking thoroughly. Gently stir in the all-purpose and whole wheat flours until just combined. Pour batter into the pan and bake for 60-70 minutes until golden brown. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.\",\n    \"thumbnail_image_url\": \"https://minimalistbaker.com/wp-content/uploads/2016/01/EASY-1-Bowl-Vegan-Banana-Bread-LOVELY-texture-simple-ingredients-gluten-free-optional-vegan-bananabread-minimalistbaker.jpg\"\n  },\n  {\n    \"recipe_name\": \"1-Bowl Chocolate Chip Banana Bread (Vegan + GF)\",\n    \"ingredients\": [\n      \"3 medium ripe bananas (mashed)\",\n      \"1 tsp vanilla extract\",\n      \"1 flax egg (1 tbsp flaxseed meal + 2.5 tbsp water)\",\n      \"3 tbsp melted coconut oil (or avocado oil)\",\n      \"1/4 cup brown sugar (or coconut sugar)\",\n      \"1/4 cup maple syrup\",\n      \"1 tsp baking soda\",\n      \"1 tsp baking powder\",\n      \"1/2 tsp sea salt\",\n      \"1/2 tsp ground cinnamon\",\n      \"3/4 cup unsweetened almond milk\",\n      \"1 1/4 cups gluten-free flour blend\",\n      \"1 cup oat flour\",\n      \"1/2 cup dairy-free chocolate chips (plus more for topping)\"\n    ],\n    \"cooking_instructions\": \"Preheat oven to 350°F (176°C) and line a loaf pan with parchment paper. Prepare the flax egg in a large bowl. Add mashed bananas, vanilla, coconut oil, brown sugar, maple syrup, baking soda, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and almond milk, then whisk to combine. Add the gluten-free flour blend and oat flour, stirring to form a uniform batter. Fold in the chocolate chips. Pour into the prepared loaf pan, sprinkle extra chocolate chips on top, and bake for 60-70 minutes. Let cool for at least 30 minutes before serving.\",\n    \"thumbnail_image_url\": \"https://minimalistbaker.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/1-Bowl-Chocolate-Chip-Banana-Bread-Vegan-GF-9.jpg\"\n  }\n]\n```","type":"text"}],"type":"model_output"}],"object":"interaction","model":"gemini-3.5-flash"}
